title: Turkish-Style Lahmacun
description: A traditional Turkish dish, this lahmacun recipe features a crispy crust topped with spiced minced meat and onions.
instructions: Roll out the lahmacun dough into a 12-inch circle.
Place the dough on a baking sheet.
In a bowl, mix together the ground beef, onion, corn, and red pepper flakes.
Spread the meat mixture evenly over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the dough up over the filling to form a crust.
Bake the lahmacun in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove the lahmacun from the oven and let it cool for 2-3 minutes.
Slide the lahmacun onto a plate and serve hot.
Cut the lahmacun into wedges and serve with lemon wedges on the side.
